name: DEFECT / DAMAGED PACKAGE – CLEARANCE: Montego Bags O' Wags Dog Treats - Peanut Butter Crunchies 1kg
description: Yummy Peanut Butter Flavour Highly nutritious, yum-a-licious, BAGS O’ WAGS are the treats dogs love to get and they’re full of munchariffic goodness! Handcrafted Flavour Each biscuit is carefully crafted using the finest ingredients, delivering a rich aroma and irresistible flavour your dog will adore. Easy to Digest Made with a single source of protein, these treats are gentle on your dog’s tummy, promoting easier digestion and happy bellies. A Perfect Treat Anytime Crunchy, tasty, and easy to snap, ideal for training rewards, positive reinforcement, or simply showing your furry friend some extra love throughout the day. Fresher Breath for Kisses Infused with a teeth-cleaning agent and rosemary extract, these treats help keep teeth clean and breath fresh, so every kiss from your pup is sweeter. Ingredients Wheat and whole wheat flour, chicken meal, palm oil, sugars, brewer’s yeast, tetrapotassium pyrophosphate, calcium carbonate, salt, rosemary extract. ADDITIVES: SENSORY: Palatability meat-based enhancers and non-lauric sucrose coating. PRESERVATIVES: Potassium sorbate and sodium metabisulphite. Nutritional Analysis (Typical per 100 g) Nutrient Content Crude Protein 22% Total Fat 12% Crude Fibre 2% Moisture 10% Calcium 1% Phosphorus 0.6% Sugars 0.3% Metabolisable Energy 392 kcal Feeding Guide Use as a complementary treat to a balanced diet. Ideal as a training reward or a daily snack for dogs of all sizes. Always provide fresh water.
